title: Two Sum II - Input Array Is Sorted
hints: The array is sorted. How does that property help you decide whether to look at smaller or larger values when a sum is too high or too low?
Use two pointers, one at the start and one at the end of the array, moving them inward based on the current sum.
If the sum of the two pointed numbers is less than target, move the left pointer right; if greater, move the right pointer left.
